## Hypothesis

**Falsifiable claim**: <!-- What measurable outcome does this change produce? -->

**Null hypothesis**: <!-- What would disprove this change is beneficial? -->

**Metric**: <!-- How will you measure success? (e.g., loss delta, latency, test count) -->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullet points describing the change -->

## Evidence

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean
- [ ] `batuta falsify` score maintained or improved
- [ ] Work item reference: Refs #

## Test Plan

<!-- How to verify this change works correctly -->

## Rollback Plan

<!-- How to revert if the hypothesis is falsified -->
